title: Evaluating protocols for reproducible targeted metabolomics by NMR.
author: Cochran D Takis PG Alexander JL Mullish BH Powell N Marchesi JR Powers R
content: S-EPMC11587611 PMC11587611 Evaluating protocols for reproducible targeted metabolomics by NMR. Metabolomics aims to study the downstream effects of variables like diet, environment, or disease on a given biological system.
